info.name: Regression - STAGE
info.description:
Release 9.6 STAGE regression — one collection, split by **module**.

## Modules
1. **CNP** — Card Not Present (17 Testmo cases)
2. **TokenVault** — TokenVault folder (13 Testmo cases)

## How to run
- Import env: prefer module env, or use values from `9.6-Regression-STAGE.postman_environment.json`.
- Inside each module: run that module’s **00. Auth** first, then TC folders in order.

## TokenVault / CP note
CP cases (cardToken GUID) need **QA lead support** (physical lane). Simulator laneId 9999 is not enough for TokenVault ACs. Requests are kept PARKED.

## Refs
- CNP cards: `CNP-STAGE-vantiv-test-cards.md`
- TokenVault cases: `tokenvault/CASE-REVIEW.md`

Modules: CNP · TokenVault · Wellfit Provisioning.
Env: Regression STAGE.

Modules: CNP · TokenVault · Wellfit Provisioning · Wallet.
Modules include PAY-2603 (TokenVault zip / Wellfit GUID hotfix).
Modules include Treasury (settlement/funding).

item.description:
AC-5 / Case 13583. Confluence Vantiv cards (see CNP-STAGE-vantiv-test-cards.md).

item.name: TC11. Validate that, the correct partial refund Amount and TransactionID is stored in the [Payments].[Refunds] table
item.description:
AC-11 / Case 13590. [Payments].[Refunds] Amount + TransactionId match partial refund.
Join via OriginalPaymentId → Payments where TransactionId = refundOriginalTransactionId.

request.description: Testmo AC-11. Send → Visualize → copy SQL → Platform.

body.raw:
SELECT r.Id, r.TransactionId, r.Amount, r.OrderId, r.OriginalPaymentId, r.TimeStamp
FROM [Payments].[Refunds] r
INNER JOIN [Payments].[Payments] p ON p.Id = r.OriginalPaymentId
WHERE p.TransactionId = '{{refundOriginalTransactionId}}'
ORDER BY r.TimeStamp DESC;
-- Expect Amount = 10.00 (partial)

exec: pm.test('refundOriginalTransactionId present', () => pm.expect.fail('Empty — run prior API step first'));
pm.test('txn id ready for SQL', () => pm.expect(id).to.be.ok);

item.name: TokenVault
item.description:
TokenVault — Testmo folder (13 cases).
Runnable without hardware: TC01–TC04, TC08–TC12.
CP (TC05–TC07, TC13): PARKED — needs QA lead / physical lane.

SQL checklist (Send → Visualize → Azure Data Studio):
| TC | Required / recommended SQL |
|----|----------------------------|
| 01 | Platform PTM=2 |
| 02 | Platform PTM=2 + TokenVault by GUID |
| 03 | Platform PTM=1 |
| 04 | Platform PTM=2 (+ TokenVault by ProcessorToken optional) |
| 05–07/13 | TokenVault by GUID (TC07); Platform PTM=5 / PTM=2 when CP runs |
| 08 | TokenVault by GUID |
| 09–11 | Platform by txn (PTM 2 or 1) |
| 12 | TokenVault by ProcessorToken (+ GUID / Platform) |

Correct DBs: Platform = [Payments].[Payments]; TokenVault = dbo.PaymentTokens (NOT Platform Payments.PaymentTokens).
